docs.title: Omni-OpenAI
docs.text: OpenAI provider adapters for the omni-* ecosystem, wrapping the official openai-go SDK.

docs.title: Overview
docs.text:
Omni-OpenAI provides unified adapters for integrating OpenAI's APIs with the omni-* ecosystem:

  • OmniLLM - Chat completions provider for omnillm-core
  • OmniVoice - STT/TTS providers for omnivoice-core

docs.title: OmniLLM Provider
docs.text:
• Chat completions (GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-3.5 Turbo, etc.)
  • Streaming responses
  • Tool/function calling
  • Vision (image inputs)
  • JSON mode
  • Auto-registration with omnillm-core registry

docs.title: OmniVoice Providers
docs.text:
• STT (Speech-to-Text): Whisper transcription with word and segment timestamps
  • TTS (Text-to-Speech): Audio synthesis with 13 voices

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/plexusone/omni-openai

docs.title: Quick Start
Configuration
docs.text:
Set the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable:

export OPENAI_API_KEY="sk-..."

docs.title: Package Structure
docs.text:
omni-openai/
├── openai.go           # Direct OpenAI client (STT/TTS)
├── omnillm/            # OmniLLM provider adapter
│   ├── adapter.go
│   └── doc.go
└── omnivoice/          # OmniVoice provider adapters
    ├── stt.go
    └── tts.go

docs.title: License
docs.text: MIT License

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: This guide covers installation and basic usage of omni-openai.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
• Go 1.21 or later
  • OpenAI API key

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: go get github.com/plexusone/omni-openai

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text:
Set your OpenAI API key as an environment variable:

export OPENAI_API_KEY="sk-..."

Or pass it directly when creating providers.

docs.title: OmniLLM - Chat Completions
docs.text:
package main

import (
    "context"
    "fmt"
    "log"
    "os"

    core "github.com/plexusone/omnillm-core"
    _ "github.com/plexusone/omni-openai/omnillm" // Auto-registers provider
)

func main() {
    ctx := context.Background()

    // Create provider via registry
    provider, err := core.NewProvider("openai", core.ProviderConfig{
        APIKey: os.Getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"),
    })
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatal(err)
    }
    defer provider.Close()

    // Send a chat completion request
    resp, err := provider.CreateChatCompletion(ctx, &core.ChatCompletionRequest{
        Model: "gpt-4o",
        Messages: []core.Message{
            {Role: core.RoleUser, Content: "What is the capital of France?"},
        },
    })
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatal(err)
    }

    fmt.Println(resp.Choices[0].Message.Content)
}

docs.title: OmniVoice - Speech-to-Text
docs.text:
package main

import (
    "context"
    "fmt"
    "log"
    "os"

    "github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-core/stt"
    "github.com/plexusone/omni-openai/omnivoice"
)

func main() {
    ctx := context.Background()

    // Create STT provider
    provider, err := omnivoice.NewSTTProviderFromEnv()
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatal(err)
    }

    // Read audio file
    audio, _ := os.ReadFile("speech.mp3")

    // Transcribe
    result, err := provider.Transcribe(ctx, audio, stt.TranscriptionConfig{
        Encoding: "mp3",
    })
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatal(err)
    }

    fmt.Println("Transcription:", result.Text)
}

docs.title: OmniVoice - Text-to-Speech
docs.text:
package main

import (
    "context"
    "log"
    "os"

    "github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-core/tts"
    "github.com/plexusone/omni-openai/omnivoice"
)

func main() {
    ctx := context.Background()

    // Create TTS provider
    provider, err := omnivoice.NewTTSProviderFromEnv()
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatal(err)
    }

    // Synthesize speech
    result, err := provider.Synthesize(ctx, "Hello, world!", tts.SynthesisConfig{
        VoiceID: omnivoice.VoiceNova,
    })
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatal(err)
    }

    // Save audio
    os.WriteFile("output.mp3", result.Audio, 0644)
}

docs.title: Next Steps
docs.text:
• OmniLLM Provider - Advanced chat completion features
  • OmniVoice Provider - STT/TTS configuration options
  • API Reference - Complete API documentation

docs.title: Client API Reference
docs.text: The root package provides a direct OpenAI client for audio operations.

docs.title: NewClient
docs.text:
Creates a new OpenAI client with the given API key.

func NewClient(apiKey string) *Client

docs.title: NewClientFromEnv
docs.text:
Creates a new client using the OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.

func NewClientFromEnv() (*Client, error)

docs.title: Transcribe
docs.text:
Converts audio to text using Whisper.

func (c *Client) Transcribe(ctx context.Context, req TranscriptionRequest) (*TranscriptionResponse, error)

TranscriptionRequest:

Field Type Description Audio []byte Audio data to transcribe Filename string Filename for format detection Model string Whisper model (default: "whisper-1") Language string ISO-639-1 language code Prompt string Optional guiding prompt ResponseFormat string Output format Temperature float64 Sampling temperature (0-1) TimestampGranularities []string "word", "segment", or both

TranscriptionResponse:

Field Type Description Text string Transcribed text Language string Detected language Duration float64 Audio duration in seconds Words []WordTimestamp Word-level timestamps Segments []Segment Segment-level timestamps

docs.title: TranscribeFile
docs.text:
Transcribes audio from a file path.

func (c *Client) TranscribeFile(ctx context.Context, filePath string, req TranscriptionRequest) (*TranscriptionResponse, error)

docs.title: Synthesize
docs.text:
Converts text to speech.

func (c *Client) Synthesize(ctx context.Context, req TTSRequest) (*TTSResponse, error)

TTSRequest:

Field Type Description Input string Text to convert (max 4096 chars) Model string "tts-1" or "tts-1-hd" Voice string Voice ID ResponseFormat string "mp3", "opus", "aac", etc. Speed float64 Speech speed (0.25-4.0)

TTSResponse:

Field Type Description Audio []byte Generated audio data Format string Audio format

docs.title: SynthesizeStream
docs.text:
Converts text to speech with streaming output.

func (c *Client) SynthesizeStream(ctx context.Context, req TTSRequest) (io.ReadCloser, error)

docs.title: OmniLLM API Reference
docs.text: The omnillm subpackage provides the OmniLLM provider adapter.

docs.title: New
docs.text:
Creates a new OpenAI provider with the given configuration.

func New(cfg Config) (*Provider, error)

docs.title: Config
docs.text: Field Type Description APIKey string OpenAI API key (required) BaseURL string Custom API endpoint Organization string OpenAI organization ID

docs.title: Name
docs.text:
Returns the provider identifier.

func (p *Provider) Name() string // Returns "openai"

docs.title: Capabilities
docs.text:
Returns the provider's supported features.

func (p *Provider) Capabilities() core.Capabilities

Returns:

core.Capabilities{
    Tools:             true,
    Streaming:         true,
    Vision:            true,
    JSON:              true,
    SystemRole:        true,
    MaxContextWindow:  128000,
    SupportsMaxTokens: true,
}

docs.title: CreateChatCompletion
docs.text:
Sends a chat completion request.

func (p *Provider) CreateChatCompletion(ctx context.Context, req *core.ChatCompletionRequest) (*core.ChatCompletionResponse, error)

docs.title: CreateChatCompletionStream
docs.text:
Creates a streaming chat completion.

func (p *Provider) CreateChatCompletionStream(ctx context.Context, req *core.ChatCompletionRequest) (core.ChatCompletionStream, error)

docs.title: Close
docs.text:
Releases resources held by the provider.

func (p *Provider) Close() error

docs.title: Auto-Registration
docs.text:
The package auto-registers with omnillm-core on import:

import _ "github.com/plexusone/omni-openai/omnillm"

This registers the OpenAI provider with priority PriorityThick (10), which overrides any thin providers.

docs.title: OmniLLM Provider
docs.text: The OmniLLM provider implements the core.Provider interface from omnillm-core, providing access to OpenAI's chat completion models.

docs.title: Features
docs.text:
• Chat completions (GPT-4, GPT-4o, GPT-3.5 Turbo, o1, etc.)
  • Streaming responses
  • Tool/function calling
  • Vision (image inputs)
  • JSON mode
  • Auto-registration with priority (overrides thin providers)

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
import (
    core "github.com/plexusone/omnillm-core"
    _ "github.com/plexusone/omni-openai/omnillm" // Auto-registers
)

The blank import auto-registers the OpenAI provider with the omnillm-core registry.

docs.title: Via Registry (Recommended)
docs.text:
provider, err := core.NewProvider("openai", core.ProviderConfig{
    APIKey: os.Getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"),
})
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
defer provider.Close()

resp, err := provider.CreateChatCompletion(ctx, &core.ChatCompletionRequest{
    Model: "gpt-4o",
    Messages: []core.Message{
        {Role: core.RoleUser, Content: "Hello!"},
    },
})

docs.title: Direct Instantiation
docs.text:
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-openai/omnillm"

provider, err := omnillm.New(omnillm.Config{
    APIKey:       os.Getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"),
    BaseURL:      "",  // Optional: custom endpoint
    Organization: "",  // Optional: organization ID
})

docs.title: Streaming
docs.text:
stream, err := provider.CreateChatCompletionStream(ctx, &core.ChatCompletionRequest{
    Model: "gpt-4o",
    Messages: []core.Message{
        {Role: core.RoleUser, Content: "Tell me a story"},
    },
})
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
defer stream.Close()

for {
    chunk, err := stream.Recv()
    if err == io.EOF {
        break
    }
    if err != nil {
        log.Fatal(err)
    }
    fmt.Print(chunk.Choices[0].Delta.Content)
}

docs.title: Tool Calling
docs.text:
resp, err := provider.CreateChatCompletion(ctx, &core.ChatCompletionRequest{
    Model: "gpt-4o",
    Messages: []core.Message{
        {Role: core.RoleUser, Content: "What's the weather in Tokyo?"},
    },
    Tools: []core.Tool{
        {
            Type: "function",
            Function: core.FunctionDefinition{
                Name:        "get_weather",
                Description: "Get weather for a location",
                Parameters: map[string]any{
                    "type": "object",
                    "properties": map[string]any{
                        "location": map[string]any{
                            "type":        "string",
                            "description": "City name",
                        },
                    },
                    "required": []string{"location"},
                },
            },
        },
    },
})

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text: Field Type Description APIKey string OpenAI API key (required) BaseURL string Custom API endpoint (for Azure or proxies) Organization string OpenAI organization ID

docs.title: Capabilities
docs.text:
The provider reports the following capabilities:

Capability Supported Tools Yes Streaming Yes Vision Yes JSON Mode Yes System Role Yes Max Context Window 128,000 tokens Max Tokens Param Yes

docs.title: OmniVoice Providers
docs.text: The OmniVoice providers implement the stt.Provider and tts.Provider interfaces from omnivoice-core.

docs.title: STT (Speech-to-Text)
docs.text:
• Whisper model transcription
  • Word-level timestamps
  • Segment-level timestamps
  • Multiple audio format support (mp3, wav, flac, opus, m4a, webm)
  • Language detection

docs.title: TTS (Text-to-Speech)
docs.text:
• 13 distinct voices
  • Multiple output formats (mp3, opus, aac, flac, wav, pcm)
  • Adjustable speed (0.25x to 4.0x)
  • Streaming output
  • HD quality model option

docs.title: Installation
docs.text: import "github.com/plexusone/omni-openai/omnivoice"

docs.title: Basic Usage
docs.text:
provider, err := omnivoice.NewSTTProviderFromEnv()
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}

result, err := provider.Transcribe(ctx, audioData, stt.TranscriptionConfig{
    Encoding: "mp3",
    Language: "en",  // Optional: auto-detected if omitted
})
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}

fmt.Println("Text:", result.Text)
fmt.Println("Language:", result.Language)
fmt.Println("Duration:", result.Duration)

docs.title: With Word Timestamps
docs.text:
result, err := provider.Transcribe(ctx, audioData, stt.TranscriptionConfig{
    Encoding:             "mp3",
    EnableWordTimestamps: true,
})

for _, segment := range result.Segments {
    fmt.Printf("[%s - %s] %s\n", segment.StartTime, segment.EndTime, segment.Text)
    for _, word := range segment.Words {
        fmt.Printf("  %s (%s)\n", word.Text, word.StartTime)
    }
}

docs.title: From File
docs.text: result, err := provider.TranscribeFile(ctx, "speech.mp3", stt.TranscriptionConfig{})

docs.title: Basic Usage
docs.text:
provider, err := omnivoice.NewTTSProviderFromEnv()
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}

result, err := provider.Synthesize(ctx, "Hello, world!", tts.SynthesisConfig{
    VoiceID: omnivoice.VoiceNova,
})
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}

// result.Audio contains MP3 data
os.WriteFile("output.mp3", result.Audio, 0644)

docs.title: Streaming Output
docs.text:
chunks, err := provider.SynthesizeStream(ctx, "Long text to synthesize...", tts.SynthesisConfig{
    VoiceID: omnivoice.VoiceAlloy,
})
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}

for chunk := range chunks {
    if chunk.Error != nil {
        log.Fatal(chunk.Error)
    }
    if chunk.IsFinal {
        break
    }
    // Process chunk.Audio
}

docs.title: Configuration Options
docs.text:
result, err := provider.Synthesize(ctx, "Hello!", tts.SynthesisConfig{
    Model:        "tts-1-hd",  // Higher quality
    VoiceID:      omnivoice.VoiceCoral,
    OutputFormat: "opus",
    Speed:        1.25,  // 25% faster
})

docs.title: Available Voices
docs.text: Voice Constant Description alloy VoiceAlloy Neutral, balanced ash VoiceAsh Warm, engaging ballad VoiceBallad Melodic, expressive coral VoiceCoral Clear, articulate echo VoiceEcho Smooth, natural fable VoiceFable Storytelling, dramatic nova VoiceNova Bright, energetic onyx VoiceOnyx Deep, resonant sage VoiceSage Calm, wise shimmer VoiceShimmer Light, cheerful verse VoiceVerse Poetic, rhythmic marin VoiceMarin Friendly, approachable cedar VoiceCedar Grounded, trustworthy

docs.title: STT Models
docs.text: Model Constant Description whisper-1 ModelWhisper1 Whisper v2 large

docs.title: TTS Models
docs.text: Model Constant Description tts-1 ModelTTS1 Fast, lower latency tts-1-hd ModelTTS1HD Higher quality audio

docs.title: Output Formats
docs.text: Format Description mp3 Default, widely supported opus Efficient, good for streaming aac Apple ecosystem flac Lossless wav Uncompressed PCM pcm Raw PCM (24kHz, 16-bit, mono)

docs.title: v0.1.0
docs.text: Release date: 2026-02-28

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text: • Initial release of omnivoice-openai (now omni-openai)

docs.title: Added
docs.text:
• OpenAI client with Transcribe, TranscribeFile, Synthesize, SynthesizeStream methods
  • OmniVoice STT provider implementing stt.Provider interface
  • OmniVoice TTS provider implementing tts.Provider interface
  • Unit tests for STT and TTS providers

docs.title: Build
docs.text:
• CI workflows for testing and linting
  • CodeQL security scanning
  • MIT license

docs.title: v0.2.0
docs.text: Release date: 2026-04-19

docs.title: Highlights
docs.text:
• Module Renamed: Changed from omnivoice-openai to omni-openai to reflect expanded scope
  • OmniLLM Support: Added OmniLLM provider adapter for chat completions

docs.title: Breaking Changes
docs.text:
• Module path changed from github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-openai to github.com/plexusone/omni-openai
  • Update all imports accordingly

docs.title: OmniLLM Provider
docs.text:
• Chat completions provider implementing core.Provider interface
  • Streaming responses via CreateChatCompletionStream
  • Tool/function calling support
  • Vision (image inputs) support
  • JSON mode support
  • Auto-registration with omnillm-core registry (priority: thick)

docs.title: Documentation
docs.text:
• MkDocs documentation site
  • Getting started guide
  • Provider documentation for omnillm and omnivoice
  • API reference documentation

docs.title: Migration Guide
docs.text:
Update your imports:

// Before
import "github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-openai/omnivoice"

// After
import "github.com/plexusone/omni-openai/omnivoice"

For OmniLLM usage:

import (
    core "github.com/plexusone/omnillm-core"
    _ "github.com/plexusone/omni-openai/omnillm"
)

provider, _ := core.NewProvider("openai", core.ProviderConfig{
    APIKey: os.Getenv("OPENAI_API_KEY"),
})
